text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I have already finished the
day's entire training schedule, but then...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, am I okay to get a few more laps in?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just got off the phone with my family back
home. They said I should keep doin' my best!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hearin' that was a real motivation booster! So
now I wanna run like it's goin' outta style!
choice_data_list: Let's work hard to meet their expectations!
It's equally important to conserve your energy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, just what I wanted to hear! Okay, I'm off to
run!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna train up 'n show the squirts back home
how I look in first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross pulls out all the stops as she keeps
training hard.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay... You might be right. If I keep trainin'
now, I won't have energy to give it my best
tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So I'll just take it easy 'n rest up. And then I'll
channel all that energy into our next session!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her plan set, Tamamo Cross heads back to
the dorm.
